name: Sondra Rush
body: Celebrating with Lyla and the family of God today! Wish we could be there in person but am so grateful to worship our God and celebrate with you today from the Cleveland area❤️

name: Judith Klopfenstein
body: This is the day the Lord has made, let us rejoice and be glad. Thinking of you all especially today. 🙏❤️😘

name: Ashley Phillips
body: What a beautiful day it is! Can't wait to see the video and celebrate with you all!

name: Veronica Klopfenstein
body: May you all have a joyous baptism and celebration today. This is wonderful. Thinking of Lyla and you all. Love and prayers, Veronica
